params.name: Positronic Brain
params.description: Proposed by Asimov in his robot series, the positronic brain is a fictional neural network core for robots. Made of platinum-iridium alloy, it processes information and executes logic, simulating human thought and emotions while adhering to the Three Laws of Robotics. It raises profound questions about the boundaries between humans and machines.
